data.content:
Stale grooming handoff

Beat was groomed because it was stale.
Decision: reshape
Rationale: The underlying need is still plausible, but the beat is too implementation-specific and underspecified for the current product. Foolery already has a direct install flow and release/channel tooling, so this should be reframed around whether Homebrew is an intended supported distribution channel, plus what ships with it (formula/tap, update path, docs, and maintenance ownership).
Agent: codex-gpt-5-4-mini
Job: stale-grooming-8
Repo: /home/cartine/foolery
Suggested title: Add a supported Homebrew distribution channel
Suggested description: Evaluate and implement Homebrew as an officially supported installation path for Foolery, separate from the existing direct Git/install.sh flow. Define the packaging, update story, and documentation needed to keep the Homebrew path maintainable.
Suggested acceptance: - A Homebrew formula or tap exists for Foolery.
- `brew install` installs a working Foolery CLI on supported macOS systems.
- The Homebrew path is documented alongside the direct install path.
- The update/reinstall story for Homebrew is defined and verified.
- The support/ownership burden for maintaining the formula is explicit.
Applied reshape fields: title, description, acceptance
